objective: Create failing Phase 0 tests that expose current dependency graph reliability failures before implementation begins.
execution_rules: Production code must not be fixed in this workorder.
The expected outcome is failing tests, not a passing suite.
Failure reasons must map to graph endpoints, identity ambiguity, unresolved imports, unresolved calls, alias handling, nested scopes, method context, or graph validation contract gaps.
Stop before Phase 1 scanner or element extraction refactor work.
acceptance_criteria: Tests exist for graph edges whose endpoints are not node IDs.
Tests exist for duplicate function names.
Tests exist for class/object method calls.
Graph validation test asserts resolved endpoints exist in nodes.
Graph validation test asserts unresolved edges include resolutionStatus.
Graph validation test asserts ambiguous edges include candidate IDs.
Targeted tests fail against the current implementation for expected reasons.
No production refactor implementation is performed.

communication_log.message: Workorder created for Phase 0 ground-truth test establishment only.
